title: Senior Doctor - Sanofi India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Sanofi India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Sanofi India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sanofi India:
Sanofi India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
